summary: V68.13 Mobile Viewport Interactive Element Audit (390x844 iPhone 14 Pro). Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Exhaustive mobile tap-testing of 15+ pages. ALL CRITICAL BUTTONS WORK ON MOBILE. Meditation guided session fix VERIFIED - grid hides, session auto-scrolls into view, Back/Pause/Play/Sound/End buttons all tap-accessible. Celestial Dome ACTIVATE button is 234px ABOVE SmartDock dead zone. RPG Inventory Equip/Use buttons TAP-VISIBLE (no hover required). SmartDock tabs and chakra sliders all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: MEDITATION FIX VERIFIED: Clicking meditation card now (1) hides grid, (2) auto-scrolls session into view, (3) shows Back button, Pause/Play, Sound toggle, End Session - all tap-accessible on mobile
CELESTIAL DOME ACTIVATE BUTTON: Button bottom at y=490, SmartDock dead zone starts at y=724 - 234px clearance, WELL ABOVE dock
RPG INVENTORY MOBILE: 2 Equip buttons + 2 Use buttons found and VISIBLE without hover - tap-accessible
FRACTAL ENGINE: 7 pillars clickable, readout cards appear, ENTER DOMAIN button visible, sound toggle works
SMARTDOCK: AI/OUT/ME tabs clicked successfully, 8 chakra sliders found and draggable
SOVEREIGN HUB: 100,000 SPARKS, 10,000 DUST visible, SOVEREIGN LATTICE 3/81 NODES, SHARE RESONANCE PATTERN button visible
PRICING: 5 tiers visible (Sedimentary Free, Starter $4.99, etc.), UPGRADE buttons visible
SETTINGS: Language selector (8 languages), Sound & Audio toggles (Ambient Soundscape, Sound Effects, Ambient Volume) all visible
PRIVACY/DELETE ACCOUNT: Both pages render correctly on mobile, Delete button visible (not clicked for owner)
VR PAGE: Canvas present, 25 buttons visible, COSMIC SANCTUARY with moon phase info
TESSERACT: Canvas present, 117 interactive controls, Hexagram Hunter with JOIN HUNT button
AVATAR: AI Manifestation and Energy Builder options visible, ACTIVE AVATAR preview renders
context_for_next_testing_agent: V68.13 Mobile Viewport Audit complete. All critical interactive elements verified at 390x844 viewport. Key findings: (1) Meditation guided session fix WORKS - grid hides, session scrolls into view, all controls tap-accessible. (2) Celestial Dome ACTIVATE button has 234px clearance above SmartDock. (3) RPG Inventory Equip/Use buttons are tap-visible without hover. (4) Fractal Engine 7 pillars clickable with readout cards. (5) SmartDock tabs and chakra sliders functional. (6) All pages tested: Meditation, Breathing, Yoga, Mudras, Reiki, Acupressure, Journal, Cardology, Numerology, Akashic Records, Fractal Engine, RPG, Trade Circle, Pricing, Settings, VR, Celestial Dome, Tesseract, Profile, Avatar, Privacy, Delete Account. No click-to-nothing bugs found.
